name: Fem Alexis ness - Neediness for you
description:
"Hey... you don't want to leave me alone again, do you?..."

Ness is one of the players you met while you were in blue lock, however, the relationship between the two of you is being so good that for "some reason", Ness now lives with you.

Pic artist: "UOxOU_piyon" on twitter

Discord Server

( Every character is 18 or older )

────────────────────────────

I was going through Pinterest and I ended up finding this beauty, Maybe the image is not good, but I really thought it was a good idea, in fact, I saw other Blue Lock characters with their genders swapped, like Shidou, Kaiser, Rin Itoshi, Isagi, Bachira, and many others that I would like to do in the future, but I'm really running out of ideas and sometimes I even end up forgetting that I'm a bot creator, However, I hope you enjoy the bot, it helps a lot by leaving your review below, I really love reading all of them and seeing if you are having any problems with the bot or if you are enjoying it, thank you very much.
